teamMembers.name: Daniel Roberts

teamMembers.name: Alex Podbrezsky

teamMembers.name: Alex Tanaka

teamMembers.name: Anna Kowalska
teamMembers.bio: Anna guides clients through onboarding and implementation, ensuring smooth adoption of automation systems and digital tools. She is passionate about languages and can comfortably communicate in four different languages.

teamMembers.name: Sophia Mitchell
teamMembers.bio: Sophia leads brand strategy, digital campaigns, and content positioning for both the agency and its clients. She has a background in documentary photography and often incorporates storytelling principles into marketing campaigns.

teamMembers.name: Marcus Halvorsen
teamMembers.bio: Marcus manages sales strategy and client acquisition, helping businesses understand how AI automation can solve operational bottlenecks. He enjoys mountain hiking in Scandinavia and is known internally for turning client meetings into strategic brainstorming sessions.

teamMembers.name: Daria Melnyk
teamMembers.bio: Daria creates intuitive interfaces and visual identities that make complex technology feel simple and engaging. She is inspired by modern architecture and frequently sketches interface concepts while visiting cafes and galleries.

teamMembers.name: Erik Dahlgren
teamMembers.bio: Erik manages cloud infrastructure, deployment pipelines, and system scalability for high-availability applications. He is an avid sailing enthusiast and enjoys applying engineering precision both to systems architecture and open-water navigation.

allCaseStudies.title: Medical Equipment Testing Company - Automated CRM and PDF Certificate Generator
allCaseStudies.description: Major Medical Equipment testing company's reduced 4 FTEs by automating 9600 certificates generation on annual basis receiving printed and emailed PDF documents generated on the fly using field engineers data on medical equipment testing results.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Major Medical Equipment testing company's clients required receiving printed and PDF documents with the medical equipment testing results. Medical companies required these compliance certificates to present to the government. The field engineers re-test medical equipment on a yearly basis countrywide. They have been doing a lot of data collect, after which data was subject to manual processing and manual certificate generation. The challenge was to create a solution which would take of this manual work and turn collected data into compliance certificates immediately. The project charter forecasted 65% effort reduction as of year 2 after first round of data was collected. The solution consisted of: - It included data collect using AirTable forms and mobile devices - QR code sticker generation and assignment to each equipment piece . Further PDF document generation automations were implemented which generated testing compliance PDF certificates for doctors, dentists and medical agencies and send them by email Tools used: - Softr - AirTable - Make.com (integromat) - Mailgun - APITemplate / airSlate

allCaseStudies.title: Twilio SMS + Notion Automation Student Pick-up
allCaseStudies.description: Hong Kong School required notification system to connect teachers, students and parents during the pick up process, saving cumulatively over 2,000 hours annually in teacher, Business Office staff, and student learning time.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Develop a telephony-based notification system to streamline communication between parents, teachers, and students during the student pick-up process. The Hong Kong school required telephony application to be developed to notify individual teachers about parent arrival. The parent would dial the number from their phone. The solution was developed to integrate Twilio with internal student information system, which sent a Google Chat notification to the teachers upon parent arrival. The system would lookup parent phone number from the Student Information system, find the relevant class period, subject and teacher and send Google Chat notification to the relevant teacher. Conditions catered for multiple calls, so that only single notification would be sent, un-identified numbers, calling outside the given timeframe. Since student information system would not have external API the automated data import/export flow was developed to have data put into Notion. The third stakeholder in the process was the Business Office to monitor parent arrival live, so the Notion Dashboard was created to enable the stakeholder to monitor the process. To monitor Efficiency the solution Google Data Studio was plugged into the data collection. The implementation of the solution has saved the client 2000+ hours a year in teacher, business office staff and student learning time. •	Parents call a designated phone number. •	The system matches the parent’s phone number with student records in the SIS. •	Google Chat notifications are sent to the respective teacher, providing details such as the class period, subject, and teacher’s name.

allCaseStudies.title: GPS Lone Worker Monitoring Platform
allCaseStudies.description: Lone workers in dangerous situations need safety monitoring.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Together with a choice of lone worker device fob, the lone worker safety management platform includes a professional 24/7 emergency monitoring service and is designed to make managing safety simple. Platform ensures that employees that work alone or in isolation can get assistance if their health or safety is threatened. To monitor users wellbeing and safety whilst on remote sites. With workforce from 2 to 1000, client has leveraged quick deployment and ensured the safety and protection of employees working alone – absolutely anywhere for its multiple clients. Features The project is a success, as we had clear roles defined - BA, Product Owner, Scrum master, Designer, Development team (Frontend and Backend), QA and Technical Documentation. We used Agile because it is about small teams working fast, going autonomous, and doing amazing things in a short amount of time. Although it’s traditionally thought for the product building stage, Agile is such a clear, simple, effective way of working that it creates tremendous value in other product stages as well – insights, rapid prototyping, post-launch, etc. We have provided logo and style design, marketing and video instructions on the product usage. Project has been extensively documented in Twilio and is currently in maintenance stage.

allCaseStudies.title: Investment Fund Contracts Signing and Tracking
allCaseStudies.description: Near native integration of 14 different DocuSign templates are used depending on the investor type with 2 different subscriptions within the process. The automation reads and writes subscription data from Salesforce reading completed envelope data from DocuSign API, as well as parsing outgoing emails.
allCaseStudies.textContent: This project involves the near-native integration of 14 unique DocuSign templates tailored to investor types and two distinct subscription models. The automation is designed to streamline the subscription process, ensuring efficient handling of subscription data, document tracking, and communication using the data from SalesForce CRM. •	Integration with 14 different DocuSign templates, automatically selected based on investor type and subscription model. •	Automation reads and writes subscription data directly from Salesforce, ensuring a centralized and up-to-date database. •	Real-time synchronization with DocuSign API to fetch and process completed envelope data. •	Parsing outgoing emails to enhance subscription-related communication and streamline notifications.

allCaseStudies.title: Data-Driven Automation Boosts Sales Agency to $147K in 84 Days
allCaseStudies.description: In just 84 days, a U.S.-based sales agency generated $147K in revenue by automating business processes.
allCaseStudies.textContent: The remarkable revenue growth was made possible through a meticulous analysis and setup of key business processes, ensuring every aspect of the sales pipeline was optimized for automation. By correctly identifying bottlenecks and inefficiencies in areas such as data collection, customer onboarding, and communication, the team implemented streamlined workflows using a low-code stack. This strategic approach allowed for seamless integration between tools like Airtable, Zapier, and GoHighLevel, enabling real-time updates and automating routine tasks. These automations freed up valuable time, reducing human error and improving responsiveness, which directly enhanced the customer experience and accelerated the path to revenue. The careful alignment of automation with business goals was instrumental in achieving the impressive $147K in revenue within a short time frame. Business KPIs tracking Ad Spend Metrics tracking Triagers KPI metrics tracking Closers KPI metrics tracking Onboarding process automation Sales Pipeline Automation with speed to lead via Kixie Powerdialler Weekly client progress follow up notification flow Partial payments automation using GHL, Zapier and  NMI VAPI - Outbound Voice Agent

allCaseStudies.title: 24/7 Voice AI Agent That Qualifies 100+ Leads per Week
allCaseStudies.description: The AI agent now qualifies 100-150 leads per week with a 98% completion rate, reduces lead intake time by 90%, operates fully autonomously 24/7, and has increased lead-to-booked-call conversions by 35%.
allCaseStudies.textContent: This project involves building a voice-based AI agent using VAPI, integrated with Make.com and GoHighLevel (GHL). The agent conducts structured conversations with potential leads, gathering key information such as name, email, and intent. Once collected, the data is automatically pushed to GHL, triggering relevant workflows and optionally scheduling appointments. The system uses advanced voice synthesis with custom prosody settings, allowing the agent to sound natural, adapt its tone, and even respond to humor. The goal was to create a fully automated yet human-like conversational interface for lead intake. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Every GHL sequence fro inbound leads is now being served by voice AI qualifying the prospects and booking the appointment an autopilot.

allCaseStudies.title: 7 Integrated Web Tools Handling 1,000+ "icon", 5+ APIs, and 3 Platforms
allCaseStudies.description: 7 custom web applications integrating V0, Supabase, Airtable, Google "icon", and AI APIs -- serving over 1,000 users. Reduced manual operations by up to 90%.
allCaseStudies.textContent: 1. Screen Management Solution (V0  + Google Calendar + Airtable) 2. Waitlist API System (V0 + Supabase) 3. Restaurant Kitchen Stock & Menu Manager + AI Recipe Generator (Supabase + V0 + ChatGPT) 4. Investment ROI Calculator (V0 + Supabase) 5. Sales Website (Basehub + Vercel + Airtable) 6. AI Agency Website (V0 + Supabase + Airtable + GHL) 7. Camp Website (Vercel + Supabase + Airtable) A real-time screen content manager for offices and events, integrated with Google Calendar to auto-display schedules, updates, or announcements. Uses V0 for the UI, Supabase for auth and media storage, and Airtable as the central content control hub for screen configurations and overrides. Admins can update content via Airtable or directly override screens via a custom dashboard. Deployed on Vercel. A flexible waitlist API system designed to support launches, gated access, or beta programs. User signups are stored in Supabase and synced to Airtable for manual segmentation, prioritization, and campaign planning. Admins can manage waitlist rules and content via Basehub. Includes webhooks for triggering onboarding emails or product access. An internal operations tool for restaurant kitchens to manage live inventory and menu availability. Uses Supabase to track stock levels, Airtable for ingredient management and supplier ordering, and OpenAI to generate recipes based on available ingredients. Menu items are auto-updated through Airtable sync, and V0 powers the intuitive kitchen dashboard. An embeddable, customizable ROI calculator for financial sites. Built with V0 and deployed via Vercel, the calculator pulls scenario presets and assumptions from Airtable, while Supabase handles user data and saved calculations. Supports ROI comparisons across stocks, real estate, and crypto, with export/share functionality.

allCaseStudies.title: LinkedIn Content AI Agent - Thought Leadership via Vectorshift
allCaseStudies.description: Reduced content creation time by 95%, enabling users to post 3-5x more consistently. Posts generated through the system achieved an average 60% higher engagement rate.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Developed an AI agent for generating personalized LinkedIn posts using Vectorshift’s workflow engine, custom vector storage, and an LLM-based content synthesis pipeline. The system analyzes past post performance, extracts tone, style, and topic patterns, and generates high-conversion content aligned with the user’s voice. Inputs can include recent achievements, industry news, or calendar events, all processed through a vectored prompt chain to maintain contextual relevance and personality.

allCaseStudies.title: iOS Android Messenger App: Flutter + Supabase Real-Time Communications
allCaseStudies.description: Messaging app with 95% shared code between iOS and Android. Features real-time chat, media sharing, voice and video calls, offline mode, and end-to-end encryption.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Successfully scaled from 100 to 50,000 concurrent users on Supabase's managed infrastructure with automatic horizontal scaling, maintaining consistent performance without infrastructure changes. Flutter | Dart | Supabase | PostgreSQL | WebSockets | FCM/APNS | Riverpod | SQLite | WebRTC | IOS | Android

allCaseStudies.title: Speed to Lead Voice AI: 500+ Weekly Calls Automated for NYC Hair Salon
allCaseStudies.description: Deployed a 3-agent Voice AI system handling 500+ calls weekly that responds to Facebook leads within minutes.
allCaseStudies.textContent: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yIg4mZYyYBY Project Overview The Challenge Technical Solution Three-Agent Architecture Platform Integration Stack Advanced Features Implemented Self-Improving System Business Impact Quantitative Results Qualitative Benefits Technical Complexity Highlights Project Duration Technologies Used Deployed an enterprise-grade Voice AI assistant system for a hair restoration clinic that calls prospects by name within minutes of Facebook ad form submission, handles hundreds of weekly calls autonomously, and continuously improves through automated conversation analysis. Client needed to convert Facebook ad leads into booked appointments faster while maintaining personalized, professional interactions. Challenges included: Timeline: 4 weeks from requirements to full deployment Ongoing: Weekly script improvements via automated Vector Shift analysis

allCaseStudies.title: Monday.com QBO Bespoke eSignature for LA Boutique Stone Fireplaces
allCaseStudies.description: Client invoices now feature fully customized HTML/CSS design, reduced invoice-to-signature turnaround by 60%.
allCaseStudies.textContent: Mobile responsive custom Signing Flow Action board where client triggers outbound emails from Client Reference Design language for custom e-Signature flow The main Signing Method Select and PDF Email sending flow 4 automations taking care of the custom solution Desktop view of the signature section within the invoice Desktop view of the generated invoice The QuickBooks invoices generating a PDF and an email that cannot be customized, so the client wanted to customize the outbound email that clients receive with the terms and conditions included into the invoice, and the client receiving the invoice should be signing it. The existing solutions would have forced client to jump between a different solutions which could hardly be customized for clients design needs. Custom HTML / CSS/ Javascript solution was created to send fully branded invoice, terms and conditions and final signed document to client whilst maintaining the design language branded as per clients requirements. The invoice itself is being done and tracked in QBO, and using Make.com the invoice information is extracted, parsed and present to client in Mobile responsive view, Desktop view for easy signing process

allCaseStudies.title: iOS Flutter Mobile App for Chicago Music Vendor

The app provides role-based access (Admin, Client, A/V) with multi-location support for venues managing entertainment across multiple properties.
